title: Flake Quarantine Record
description: A record that tracks and quarantines a flaky evaluation case.

id.description: Stable identifier for the quarantine record.

case_id.description: The ID of the dataset case being quarantined.

suite_id.description: The ID of the suite where the case flakes.

evaluator_id.description: The evaluator that produced the flaky result.

flake_rate.description: A number representing the observed flake rate.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the case was quarantined.

reason.description: Explanation of why the case was quarantined.

status.description: The current status of the quarantine (e.g., active, resolved).
